## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` is clean
- [ ] `pytest` is green locally
- [ ] No em-dashes in committed prose (use commas, periods, hyphens)
- [ ] No personal information (names, emails, phone numbers, IP addresses, API keys, vault paths) in code, docs, or commit messages
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `[Unreleased]` section if user-visible
- [ ] Updated `ROADMAP.md` or `ARCHITECTURE.md` if the change affects scope or shape
